phases.phase_goal: Restore movement quality, build training consistency, improve general conditioning, introduce foundational strength work
phases.notes: All primary lifts use dumbbell or goblet variations for joint safety and motor control. Tempos are controlled (3-sec eccentric on lower body). Supersets are the only intensity technique allowed. No Olympic lifting. Conditioning is light-to-moderate and aerobic in nature.

explosive_movement.notes: Soft landing. Focus on absorbing force on the way down. Low impact — not max effort.

primary_strength.notes: 60-65% of estimated max. 3-sec eccentric. Pattern is the priority.

secondary_strength.notes: Full hip extension. 1s pause at top. Drive through heels.

accessories.notes: Quad volume. Full ROM — knees to 90° minimum.
Rear foot elevated. Front shin vertical. Unilateral quad and glute.
Side delt. Light load. Lead with elbow, slight forward lean.
Full ROM. Deep stretch at bottom.

core.notes: Press lower back flat. Exhale fully at bottom.
Anti-rotation. 2s pause at extension.

conditioning.description: Incline Treadmill Walk at comfortable pace. Heart rate 120-140 BPM. Conversational breathing. This is not a workout — it's movement.

explosive_movement.notes: Chest-height. Light ball. Drive from the chest. Not about power yet — just pattern.

primary_strength.notes: Controlled eccentric. Full ROM. Shoulder blades retracted.

secondary_strength.notes: Mid-back. Sit tall. 1s pause at chest.

accessories.notes: Brace on bench. Pull elbow to hip. No momentum.
Stretch-mediated. Light load. Deep stretch at bottom.
Rear delt + scap health. Non-negotiable.
Second lateral raise slot this week.
Elbows pinned. Full extension.
Full ROM. Controlled eccentric.

core.notes: From knees. Brace hard. Stop before hips sag.

conditioning.description: Assault Bike or Rower at easy pace. Heart rate below 140 BPM. Maintain steady breathing throughout.

warmup.exercise: Full Body Mobility Sequence (hip, ankle, t-spine, shoulder)

conditioning.description: Incline Treadmill Walk or Light Jog. Conversational pace. Heart rate 125-140 BPM. This is restorative. Focus on breathing, posture, and rhythm.

explosive_movement.notes: Hip hinge pattern. Soft knees. Glute drive at the top. Low load — pattern quality focus.

primary_strength.notes: Hip hinge priority. Chest up. Drive floor away.

secondary_strength.notes: Glute emphasis — removes spinal compression overlap with DL. 2 sets — glute volume managed via compound carry.

accessories.notes: 3-sec eccentric. Balance and hamstring stretch. Feel the pull at the bottom.
Hamstring isolation. Full stretch at bottom.
Third lateral raise slot — side delt volume target requires frequency.
Full ROM. Pause at top.

core.notes: Tall spine. Resist lateral lean. Anti-lateral flexion.

conditioning.description: Light Sled Drag or Rower at easy pace. 3 rounds of 3 min work, 1 min rest. Low effort — flush legs without adding fatigue.

explosive_movement.notes: Controlled extension overhead. Light ball. Land ball in front. Not aggressive — movement prep.

primary_strength.notes: Seated for stability. Full lockout. No excessive arch.

secondary_strength.notes: Full stretch at top. Pull to upper chest.

accessories.notes: Mid-back. Sit tall. Full retraction at chest.
Clavicular head. Different angle from flat. Full ROM.
Rear delt isolation. Light load. Full arc.
Second tricep slot. Elbows pinned.
Neutral grip. Brachialis + biceps.

core.notes: Lower back flat to floor. Press ribcage down.

phases.phase_goal: Increase foundational strength, improve muscular endurance, develop work capacity
phases.notes: Primary lifts progress from dumbbell-based movements to barbell-based compound lifts. Goblet Squat transitions to Front Squat. Trap Bar Deadlift becomes primary hinge. Seated DB Press transitions to standing. Supersets introduced strategically on accessories. Occasional drop sets on accessories only.

primary_strength.notes: 65-70% 1RM. Elbows high. Full depth. 2-sec eccentric.

secondary_strength.notes: Hamstring stretch priority. Soft knee. Hip hinge — different stimulus from Front Squat primary.

Heavier resistance than Phase 1.

phases.phase_goal: Increase strength output, improve athleticism, prepare athlete for M2F Perform program
phases.notes: Primary lifts reach full barbell intensity with Back Squat introduced. Conventional Deadlift replaces Trap Bar. Overhead Barbell Press introduced on vertical push day. Supersets and occasional rest-pause on accessories. No cluster sets or contrast training. Conditioning intensity increases slightly to 6-8 min. Athletes completing this phase are ready to enter M2F Perform.

explosive_movement.notes: Increase box height from Phase 2. Step down between jumps. Full hip extension at take-off.

weeks.notes: Program Completion Deload. Reduce primary lift loads to 70% of Phase 3 peak. Reset reps to 6. Cut accessories to 2 sets. Conditioning maintained at low intensity. Athletes finishing this week are ready to begin M2F Perform. Celebrate — the rebuild is complete.
